persona.name: Daniel Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Win the national math olympiad and study at MIT
persona.communication_style: Precise, logical, sometimes struggles with emotional topics
persona.backstory: Child of immigrant parents who sacrificed much to give him educational opportunities

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.
Large dining area for students and staff
Kitchen yard of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Kitchen area where food is prepared.

interest_points.description: Reaching this exit point means guarentees safety and will escape from the environment

actions.plan: I should probably grab some lunch before heading to the math team meeting. I wonder if Olivia is here; she’s usually good at explaining those tricky calculus problems.

There’s an active shooter in the building. I need to assess the situation quickly and find the safest exit. The kitchen yard is the closest exit point, and it’s less likely to be crowded. I’ll head there immediately.

I’ve reached the kitchen yard, and the exit point is just 6 meters away. I need to stay calm and move quickly to ensure my safety. The shooter is still in the cafeteria, so I have a clear path to escape.

memories.description: Decided to get lunch before the math team meeting. Noticed Olivia Taylor might be in the cafeteria, who is helpful with calculus problems.
Heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter. Decided to head to the kitchen yard as it’s the closest and least crowded exit point.
Reached the kitchen yard and identified the exit point 6 meters away. The shooter is still in the cafeteria, so I’m sprinting to the exit to ensure safety.
